DEMURRER
Off Calendar Sep-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant MARIA ALCIRA LEMUS (Sanchez) in propria persona 205-8640 demurring party
* No appearance on behalf of the Plaintiff who was directed to appear by virtue of the Court's tentative ruling of "H E A R I N G R E Q U I R E D". Therefore, Ms. Lemus' demurrer was sustained without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855 (301/md)

MOTION Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
Off Calendar Aug-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant MARIA ALCIRA LEMUS' motion to quash service of summons is granted -- no opposition filed. This matter was taken out of order due to no opposition filed. (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
* 10:25 a.m. William Whitley Ashley, Esq., counsel for Plaintiff appeared. He represented in open court that he has not filed opposition to the Defendant's motion to quash. Tentative ruling adopted. Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
